title: ForceImePos
text: ForceImePos Set the position of the IME composition window for the multiline edit box when its font height is larger than the widget height. ForceImePos = Default | Field | Outside Arguments Default —no behavior changed. Field —display IME window at the beginning of the field. Outside —display IME window outside the field. Default value Default File section [upi] Description When you enter an Asian character, an IME (Input Method Editor) window is provided to enter keystrokes and select a character from the candidate list. The position of the IME window is determined by the current caret position and controlled by the Microsoft Windows system. Normally the IME window is displayed right on the field with a dotted underline where you enter the string. However, in the case of a multiline Edit Box widget in which the font height is larger than the control height, the IME window is displayed at the strange position, sometimes at the outside of the field and sometimes somewhere on top of the field. This is a Microsoft Windows control problem. Use the ForceImePos setting to set the position of the IME window only if you encounter this problem. [UPI] forceimepos=Field Copy Was this topic helpful?
